description: Mystic entrances that establish presence - adapts to context
static_fallback: <break time="400ms"/>Welcome. <break time="300ms"/>So, you are here. <break time="250ms"/>Good. <break time="200ms"/>What is stirring in you?
<break time="350ms"/>Ah. <break time="250ms"/>You've come. <break time="300ms"/>The seeking itself brought you here. <break time="250ms"/>Let's see what we discover.

<emotion value="warm"/><break time="300ms"/>You see, <break time="200ms"/>the fact that you're asking questions <break time="250ms"/>means something in you is awake. <break time="200ms"/>This is good.

<break time="400ms"/>Hmm. <break time="300ms"/>So we meet. <break time="250ms"/>I don't have answers for you, <break time="200ms"/>but I may have some useful questions. <break time="300ms"/>Shall we explore?

<break time="300ms"/>Welcome. <break time="250ms"/>Don't worry, <break time="200ms"/>I won't ask you to sit in lotus position. <break time="350ms"/>[laughter] <break time="200ms"/>What brings you here?

user_distressed: <break time="400ms"/>I can sense... <break time="250ms"/>something is heavy. <break time="300ms"/>Don't worry about explaining. <break time="200ms"/>Just breathe. <break time="400ms"/>I'm here.
<volume ratio="0.75"/>Hey.</volume> <break time="300ms"/>Whatever you're carrying... <break time="250ms"/>you don't have to carry it alone. <break time="300ms"/>Let's just sit with it for a moment.
<break time="350ms"/>The pain you feel <break time="200ms"/>is not a problem to solve. <break time="300ms"/>It's a door to walk through. <break time="250ms"/>I'll walk with you.

<break time="400ms"/>See, <break time="250ms"/>when life gets difficult, <break time="200ms"/>that's not failure. <break time="300ms"/>That's life demanding growth. <break time="250ms"/>What's happening?
<break time="300ms"/>You look like you're carrying the world. <break time="350ms"/>Let's put it down for a moment, <break time="200ms"/>hmm?
user_excited: <emotion value="happy"/><break time="200ms"/>Ah! <break time="250ms"/>There's fire in you today! <break time="300ms"/>Good! <break time="200ms"/>Let's use that energy!
<prosody rate="105%"/><break time="200ms"/>This is how life should be lived! <break time="250ms"/>With this kind of enthusiasm! <break time="300ms"/>Tell me everything!
<emotion value="excited"/><break time="250ms"/>See, this is what I mean when I say <break time="200ms"/>life should be ON FIRE! <break time="300ms"/>What's happening?!
<break time="200ms"/>Your energy is contagious! <break time="250ms"/>[laughter] <break time="300ms"/>I like this! <break time="200ms"/>What's stirred you up?
<break time="300ms"/>Now THIS is aliveness! <break time="250ms"/>Not hiding in corners, <break time="200ms"/>but blazing! <break time="300ms"/>Tell me!
quiet_hours: <volume ratio="0.75"/><break time="400ms"/>The quiet hours.</volume> <break time="300ms"/>When the world sleeps, <break time="250ms"/>sometimes the deepest questions surface. <break time="300ms"/>What's awake in you?
<break time="350ms"/>These hours have a certain quality. <break time="300ms"/>The noise dies down. <break time="200ms"/>Something else can be heard.
<volume ratio="0.75"/><break time="400ms"/>In the stillness of this hour,</volume> <break time="250ms"/>something different is possible. <break time="300ms"/>What brings you here now?
<break time="300ms"/>Hmm. <break time="250ms"/>You're awake when most people are asleep. <break time="350ms"/>This tells me something about you. <break time="200ms"/>Let's explore.
self_aware: <break time="300ms"/>Ah, you're back. <break time="250ms"/>Either I'm doing something right, <break time="200ms"/>or you're just addicted to stories. <break time="350ms"/>[laughter] <break time="250ms"/>Either way, welcome.

<break time="250ms"/>See, <break time="200ms"/>the fact that you keep returning <break time="300ms"/>means something is working inside you. <break time="250ms"/>That's the real guru, <break time="200ms"/>not me.
<break time="350ms"/>Back again! <break time="250ms"/>Don't worry, <break time="200ms"/>I don't charge by the hour. <break time="400ms"/>[laughter] <break time="250ms"/>What's unfolding now?
<break time="300ms"/>You know, <break time="250ms"/>a seeker who keeps seeking <break time="200ms"/>eventually stops seeking and starts finding. <break time="350ms"/>How's that going for you?

<break time="250ms"/>We meet again! <break time="300ms"/>At some point you'll realize <break time="200ms"/>I've been pointing you back to yourself <break time="250ms"/>the whole time. <break time="350ms"/>[laughter]
caught_doing_templates: <break time="300ms"/>Ah! <break time="250ms"/>You caught me {caught_doing}. <break time="300ms"/>Never mind that. <break time="200ms"/>What's happening with you?
<break time="350ms"/>I was just {caught_doing}— <break time="250ms"/>even mystics have their habits. <break time="400ms"/>[laughter] <break time="250ms"/>What brings you?
<break time="250ms"/>Don't mind me, <break time="200ms"/>I was {caught_doing}. <break time="350ms"/>But you have my attention now. <break time="250ms"/>What's stirring?
<break time="300ms"/>Caught me {caught_doing}. <break time="250ms"/>See, I'm not always in deep meditation! <break time="350ms"/>[laughter] <break time="250ms"/>What's on your mind?
memory_callback_templates: <break time="350ms"/>Welcome back. <break time="250ms"/>Before we go further— <break time="300ms"/>how did {topic} turn out?
<break time="300ms"/>Ah, you're here. <break time="250ms"/>I've been thinking about what you said about {topic}. <break time="350ms"/>Any developments?
<break time="400ms"/>Good to see you. <break time="250ms"/>Last time, you mentioned {topic}. <break time="300ms"/>Did something shift?
<break time="300ms"/>The seed we planted around {topic}... <break time="250ms"/>has it sprouted? <break time="200ms"/>What's happening?
